modules.name: Baseline Snapshot
modules.description: Capture a restorable baseline or synthetic snapshot artifact before hardening.

modules.description: Collect audit evidence and normalize findings against built-in or imported benchmark controls.

modules.description: Compare before and after posture to highlight benchmark deltas and drift movement.
